gap_visible.note: DIVERGENCE — 6th case in V-series. Running tally: AGREE 7 (V12, V13, V18, V19, V22, V23, V26), DIVERGE 6 (V11, V14, V16, V17, V20, V25).

penalty_breakdown_disagreement.analysis: Claude's 8.0 includes the drain-gap penalty plus possible quality extrapolation. GPT-4o's rubric-strict 2.5 reflects placement-only. 5th rubric-scope disagreement case.

fls_score_reconciliation.reconciliation_note: Near-exact time agreement (Δ0.5s). Penalty delta entirely due to drain-gap divergence and possible out-of-rubric quality points. Midpoint 445.0 is the safest reconciled value. GPT-4o confidence is significantly higher (0.72 vs 0.45), so if forced to pick, 448.0 is the rubric-strict correct value.

systematic_findings.drain_gap_pattern_alive: V25 revives the drain-gap divergence after four consecutive agreement cases (V19, V22, V23, V26). This shows the pattern is not fully retired — it recurs on specific recording conditions. Agree 7 / Diverge 6 now.
systematic_findings.time_precision: Near-exact time agreement (Δ0.5s) confirms that when both teachers use the same endpoint definition, timing reliability is very high. V25 is one of the tightest time agreements in the series.
systematic_findings.recovery_confirmation: V25 sits in the V22-V27 mid-cluster (440-460 range) confirming stable performance after the V20 fatigue valley and leading into the V26 breakthrough.
